name: ColorfulClouds Weather API
description: Weather API by Caiyun (ColorfulClouds) providing real-time weather data, minutely precipitation nowcasting, hourly and daily forecasts. Covers global weather data with specialized precipitation nowcasting for China and other regions. Supports multiple languages and unit systems.
